content: Static HTML shared nav/footer pattern: js/components.js exports HTML strings and uses document.getElementById('nav-root').innerHTML = navHTML. Call from <script type='module' src='/js/components.js'> in each page. Alpine stores initialized in same module. Active link: in components.js, after injecting nav HTML, loop through nav links with document.querySelectorAll('nav a') and compare link.getAttribute('href') to window.location.pathname. Apply active class (e.g. text-sage border-b border-sage).
